display_name: Apply surprising, mind blowing effects to your photo with Pika-v1.5 Effects. Attach an image and be amazed by the effects like "cakeify," "crush" and "crumble", open the parameter controls shelf for a
description:
Apply surprising, mind blowing effects to your photo with Pika-v1.5 Effects. Attach an image and be amazed by the effects like "cakeify," "crush" and "crumble", open the parameter controls shelf for a full list of effects.

Full list of effects:
Cake-ify, Crumble, Crush, Decapitate, Deflate, Dissolve, Explode, Eye-pop, Inflate, Levitate, Melt, Peel, Poke, Squish, Ta-da, Tear

Optional parameters:
- Seed. Random seed number for reproducible generation with fixed seed
- Negative prompt. Type things to avoid in generated images
